name: v3.4.125
notes:
## Migration Guide

Use the System Updates tool in Markdown Editor to download and apply `press-system-v3.4.125.zip`.

upgradeFrom.message: Update to v3.4.124 first and publish the content model migration before installing v3.4.125.

themeContractUpgrade.message: Update installed themes to contract v2 before installing v3.4.125.

contentModelUpgrade.message: Open v3.4.124, publish the content model migration, then install v3.4.125.
